interactionPlan.concept: The effect of Gaussian derivatives at different scales on image detail and boundaries.
elements: visual representations of Gaussian derivatives on images

interactions.label: Adjust sigma
interactions.teaches: how changing the standard deviation (sigma) impacts the influence of Gaussian derivatives at different scales on an image

interactions.label: Show x-derivative
interactions.teaches: visualize how the x-derivative of the Gaussian function transforms the data

interactions.label: Play multiscale analysis
interactions.teaches: observe the shift in emphasis from fine details to coarser features as sigma increases

interactions.label: View Hermite polynomial steps
interactions.teaches: understand the connection between polynomial degree and Gaussian derivatives

interactionPlan.camera_suggestion: isometric view focusing on Gaussian plots with a transition to 2D image filtered views
interactionPlan.notes: Ensure clear visualization of both plots and real-world image applications to connect mathematical concepts to practical outcomes.

gpt-4o.notes: Good interactivity and clear labels, but geometry complexity differs noticeably.
